_purpose: Release dates of the evaluated models. The contamination-control slice uses only filings PUBLISHED by Companies House on or after threshold_date, i.e. after every evaluated model was released. Content published after a model's release cannot appear in its training data - this bounds contamination without needing vendor cutoff disclosures.
threshold_rule: max(released) + 1 day, applied to the Companies House daily archive date (Accounts_Bulk_Data-YYYY-MM-DD.zip), which is the date the filings became public.
verified: 2026-07-05 via vendor announcements and contemporaneous coverage
